Output: 20V~3.25A 65W (Compatible 65W / 45W) Connector Size: Round tip 4.0*1.7mm Please note: When choosing a charger, you should choose one with the same power and interface as the one that came with your laptop. To get the correct adapter, please double-check that your original adapter's output and interface size are identical. Package: 1 x 65W Round tip ac adapter Fit for Lenovo Portable compact design: You can work and charge your laptop anywhere. Carry the adapter with you in your bag. Charge your laptop anytime, anywhere. The chargers are not as bulky as traditional chargers, they are thinner and lighter. Automatic Protection: equipped with various safety mechanisms such as overheating protection and short circuit protection, ensuring the safety of users during use and effectively extending battery life.
